Thanks for contributing to DatPlotX! Please fill out the sections below.

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Keep it focused — one logical change per PR. -->

## Related issues

<!-- Link issues this addresses, e.g. "Closes #123". Delete if none. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Branched from `main` and kept to one logical change.
- [ ] `dotnet build` passes.
- [ ] `dotnet test` passes (added/updated tests in `DatPlotX.Tests/` for behavior changes).
- [ ] `dotnet format --verify-no-changes` passes.
- [ ] New code respects the conventions in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md): strict MVVM, compiled bindings, async-all-the-way, nullable-clean, culture-aware parsing, and file/column input routed through the validators.
- [ ] Updated [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) if the change is user-visible.

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots for UI changes, etc. -->
